action_set_definitions.name: list_conflicts
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all files in the repository that currently have unresolved merge conflicts.

action_set_definitions.name: read_file_content
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the content of a specific file, including any merge conflict markers if present.

file_path.description: The path to the file to be read.

action_set_definitions.name: write_file_content
action_set_definitions.description: Overwrites the content of a file. Used to save the resolved version of a file after removing conflict markers.

content.description: The full text content to be written to the file.

action_set_definitions.name: stage_file
action_set_definitions.description: Stages a file for the next commit, signaling that conflicts in this file have been resolved.

file_path.description: The path of the file to stage.

action_set_definitions.name: commit_merge
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the current merge process by creating a merge commit.

commit_message.description: The commit message for the merge.

state_description.working_tree: A map of file paths to their current text content, including conflict markers if the file is in a conflicted state.
state_description.staging_area: A list of file paths that have been staged using 'git add'.
state_description.current_branch: The name of the branch currently checked out (e.g., 'main' or 'feature-branch').
state_description.conflicts: A list of file paths that currently contain unresolved merge conflicts.
state_description.merge_head: The name of the branch or commit hash being merged into the current branch.

working_tree.docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: Documentation for the fintech monorepo architecture.
